message:
feat(engine): improve TypeScript normalization and IFC lowering robustness

Refactor find_top_level_char() to check target match before depth adjustment
so delimiter characters like '(' can be found at top level. Replace fragile
line-by-line namespace lowering with a lexical state machine
(LexicalRewriteState::Code) that correctly handles nested braces, string
literals, and template expressions. Add strip_leading_keyword() helper and
parse_simple_namespace_declaration() for cleaner keyword parsing.

- ts_normalization: fix find_top_level_char match-before-depth ordering
- ts_normalization: rewrite lower_simple_namespaces with lexical state machine
- ts_normalization: add strip_leading_keyword and parse_simple_namespace_declaration
- lowering_pipeline: refinements to IR3 generation
- ifc_provenance_index: enhanced provenance tracking for information flow control

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
